# Apply to the program

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. This page is structured for eligibility, timeline, and application steps.

## Eligibility

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

- Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
- Consectetur adipiscing elit
- Sed do eiusmod tempor

## What to submit

Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

- CV or résumé
- Short statement of interest
- Optional supporting materials

# Process

## 01 — Prepare

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

## 02 — Submit

Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco.

## 03 — Hear back

Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit.

*Application deadlines, fees, and forms can be inserted here once finalized.*
